name: KABALE IGNATIUS MUKUNTO
summary: A mature, enthusiastic, self-driven and hardworking person ready to work in challenging environments. Goal-oriented and committed to attainment of results with minimum supervision.

experience.title: Coordinator, Lecturer
experience.company: Dag Hammarskjöld Institute for Peace and Conflict Studies
experience.description: Teaching duties, invigilation of examinations; co-teaching courses on Introduction to Human Rights, Conflict Prevention and Management, Political Systems and Institutions of Governance, Democratization Process and Gender, Human Rights and Socioeconomics, Housing, Dislocation and Evictions. Coordinating courses under human rights, governance and peacebuilding specialization, co-supervise theses and dissertations, assess students on a continuous basis, set and mark assignments, undertake original and collaborative research, develop new and advanced courses, participate in administration of other academic affairs of the unit.

experience.title: Programme Coordinator/Lecturer
experience.company: Peacebuilding and Conflict Transformation Programme, Mindolo Ecumenical Foundation
experience.description: Design, develop and deliver courses on the Pan African Peacebuilding and Conflict Transformation Diploma Programme including: Conflict Analysis – The African Condition; Globalization, Conflict and Peacebuilding; Nonviolence – Faith base, Philosophy and Practice; Introduction to Peacebuilding; African Indigenous Knowledge Systems; Human Rights, Conflicts and Peacebuilding. Assess and grade students module assignments and ensure that continuous and final assessments before graduation.

experience.title: Instructor
experience.company: Peacebuilding and Conflict Transformation Programme, Mindolo Ecumenical Foundation
experience.description: Facilitating modules in the Pan African Diploma and Certificate Courses including Understanding Violence in Africa; Globalization, Conflict and Peacebuilding; and Nonviolence: Faith base, Philosophy and Practice. Assess, Grade and record students assignments and compile final grades in readiness for graduation.

education.degree: Diploma in Peacebuilding and Conflict Transformation
Certificate in Accounting and Business Studies (CABS)
education.institution: Zambia Institute of Business Studies & Industrial Practice (ZIBSIP)

skills: Ability to apply technical knowledge in public sphere
Good Pedagogical, Analytical and Communication Skills
Ability to operate in multicultural setting
Computer literate – Microsoft Word, PowerPoint, Outlook, Excel etc.
